title: Bridge Essay: Knowing the Knowing. Non-dual Meditative Practice From an Enactive Perspective.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.

**Knowing the Knowing. Non-dual Meditative Practice From an Enactive Perspective.** — Front Psychol. PMID: 35519658. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2022.778817. Within avariety of contemplative traditions, non-dual-oriented practices were developed to evoke an experiential shift into amode of experiencing in which the cognitive structures of self-other and subject-object subside. These practices serve to de-reify the enactment of an observing witness which is usually experienced as separate from the objects of awareness.
